speaker: speaker1
text: Um , what will you do this weekend ?

speaker: speaker2
text: How about a movie ? We haven't done that for a while .

speaker: speaker1
text: A movie ? Sure . Do you know what's on right now ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No . Why don't you check out the newspaper ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Ok . Maybe you should invite your sister along , too .
